news.t: These bonds, perfect for retirees, are paying twice their historic average

overview.description: The PIMCO 1-5 Year US TIPS Index Exchange-Traded Fund (STPZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks a market-value-weighted index of short-term US Treasury Inflation Protected Securities. STPZ was launched on Aug 20, 2009 and is issued by PIMCO.
infoTable: ICE BofA US Inflation-Linked Treasury (1-5 Y)

data.title: These bonds, perfect for retirees, are paying twice their historic average
data.text: I'm not even retired and I've been buying long-term inflation-protected U.S. Treasury bonds in my 401(k) with both hands.
